name: Pasta & Sausage Oregano
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Hot bulk sausage, or sweet sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta al dente in a pot.
2. In a large saucepan, add oil and garlic. Break up the sausage with a fork while cooking for about 5 minutes.
3. Add white wine and oregano, then cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Stir in heavy cream and parmesan cheese. Cook until the sauce boils.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Pour the sauce over the cooked pasta and toss to coat.
